infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Used to capture traffic violation evidence.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Used to tag the location of a reported violation.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Used to record violation video evidence.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow MP Traffic Seva to access your camera to capture evidence.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow MP Traffic Seva to tag violation locations.

extra.comment: DEMO ONLY: set apiBaseUrl in src/services/api.js to your machine's LAN IP for a real device.
